title: The two-cell P0 projection residual has zero mean

source.notes: Generated from checked Lean ground truth; source repository withheld during public release.

informal.statement: Subtracting the two-cell average from both cell values gives residuals whose sum is zero.
assumptions: u0 and u1 are real cell values
the projected constant is the arithmetic mean

declarations.name: cellAverage2
declarations.statement: def cellAverage2 (u0 u1 : Real) : Real := (u0 + u1) / 2

declarations.name: p0Projection2_residual_mean_zero
declarations.statement: theorem p0Projection2_residual_mean_zero (u0 u1 : Real) : (u0 - cellAverage2 u0 u1) + (u1 - cellAverage2 u0 u1) = 0

tasks.input: Translate the zero-mean residual property of a two-cell P0 projection into Lean 4.
tasks.target: theorem p0Projection2_residual_mean_zero (u0 u1 : Real) : (u0 - cellAverage2 u0 u1) + (u1 - cellAverage2 u0 u1) = 0

tasks.input: Complete the Lean proof by unfolding the average and simplifying.
